item.name: Ghost Shark
item.description:
According to certain sources, it is able to appear spontaneously from any body of water. Such stories, however, are probably best ignored.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Noting the haunting glow of its remains─a result of the fish's innate ability to store vast quantities of aether in its body that had yet to disperse─the two naturalists who first discovered this wavekin were at odds as to what to name it. One insisted it be named a phantom shark, the other a specter shark. After much feuding they came to a compromise, and thus it would be called the ghost shark.
